title: Use of There

lessons.title: There is — एक चीज़ है (Singular Present)
lessons.theory: We use 'There is' when we want to say that ONE thing exists or is present. The subject comes AFTER 'there is'. This is called 'existential there' — it does not mean a place, it just introduces the subject.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There is' का प्रयोग तब होता है जब हम कहना चाहते हैं कि कोई एक चीज़ मौजूद है। Subject 'there is' के बाद आता है। यह 'there' किसी जगह को नहीं दर्शाता — यह सिर्फ subject को introduce करता है।
lessons.formula: There is + a/an + Singular Noun + Place/Description
lessons.formulaHindi: There is + a/an + एकवचन संज्ञा + जगह/विवरण
keyRules: Use 'There is' with singular (एकवचन) nouns
Use 'There is' with uncountable nouns (water, milk, rice, money)
The real subject comes after 'is', not before it
Never say 'There is many' — that is WRONG
Correct: There is a book. Wrong: There is books.

examples.english: There is a book on the table.
examples.hindi: मेज पर एक किताब है।

examples.english: There is a fan in my room.
examples.hindi: मेरे कमरे में एक पंखा है।

examples.hindi: थिएटर में एक नई फिल्म है।

examples.hindi: खिड़की के पास एक कुर्सी है।

examples.english: There is a hospital on MG Road.
examples.hindi: MG Road पर एक अस्पताल है।

examples.english: There is a new teacher today.
examples.hindi: आज एक नए शिक्षक हैं।

examples.english: There is milk in the fridge.
examples.hindi: फ्रिज में दूध है।

examples.english: There is a lot of traffic on this road.
examples.hindi: इस सड़क पर बहुत ट्रैफिक है।

examples.english: There is an email for you.
examples.hindi: आपके लिए एक email है।

commonErrors.explanation: Use 'There is' for existence, not 'There have'

lessons.title: There are — कई चीज़ें हैं (Plural Present)
lessons.theory: We use 'There are' when we want to say that MORE THAN ONE thing exists or is present. Always use 'There are' with plural nouns.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There are' का प्रयोग तब होता है जब हम कहना चाहते हैं कि एक से अधिक चीज़ें मौजूद हैं। हमेशा 'There are' का प्रयोग बहुवचन (plural) संज्ञाओं के साथ होता है।
lessons.formula: There are + Number/Many/Some + Plural Noun + Place/Description
lessons.formulaHindi: There are + संख्या/Many/Some + बहुवचन संज्ञा + जगह/विवरण
keyRules: Use 'There are' with plural (बहुवचन) nouns
Use 'There are' with numbers more than one (two, three, many, several)
Correct: There are many students. Wrong: There is many students.
There are + some = कुछ हैं
There are + a few = थोड़े हैं
There are + a lot of = बहुत सारे हैं

commonErrors.correct: There is a lot of work.
commonErrors.explanation: Work is uncountable, use 'is' + 'a lot of'

lessons.title: There was / There were — Past Tense (भूतकाल)
lessons.theory: We use 'There was' for one thing that existed in the past, and 'There were' for multiple things that existed in the past. These describe situations that no longer exist.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There was' का प्रयोग उस एक चीज़ के लिए होता है जो भूतकाल में थी, और 'There were' का प्रयोग उन कई चीज़ों के लिए होता है जो भूतकाल में थीं।
lessons.formula: There was + a/an + Singular Noun + (Past time/place) | There were + Plural Noun + (Past time/place)
lessons.formulaHindi: There was + एकवचन संज्ञा + (भूतकाल का समय/जगह) | There were + बहुवचन संज्ञा + (भूतकाल का समय/जगह)
keyRules: There was = singular past (एकवचन भूतकाल)
There were = plural past (बहुवचन भूतकाल)
Use with yesterday, last week, last year, in 2020, etc.
There was a time... = एक समय था...
There were days when... = ऐसे दिन थे जब...

examples.english: There was a problem yesterday.
examples.hindi: कल एक समस्या थी।

lessons.title: There will be — Future Tense (भविष्यकाल)
lessons.theory: We use 'There will be' to talk about something that will exist in the future. It works for both singular and plural nouns — unlike is/are/was/were, 'will be' stays the same.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There will be' का प्रयोग उन चीज़ों के बारे में बात करने के लिए होता है जो भविष्य में होंगी। यह singular और plural दोनों के लिए एक जैसा रहता है।
lessons.formulaHindi: There will be + a/an/संज्ञा + (भविष्य का समय/जगह)
keyRules: There will be = भविष्य में कुछ होगा
Works for both singular AND plural (no change)
Use with: tomorrow, next week, soon, in the future, later
Negative: There will not be / There won't be
Question: Will there be...?

examples.english: There will be a meeting tomorrow.
examples.hindi: कल एक मीटिंग होगी।

examples.english: There will be many people at the event.

commonErrors.correct: There will be a test tomorrow.
commonErrors.explanation: Don't drop 'will' — the full form is 'will be'

lessons.title: There has been / There have been — Present Perfect
lessons.titleHindi: There has been / There have been — Present Perfect
lessons.theory: We use 'There has been' (singular) and 'There have been' (plural) when something happened in the recent past and still affects the present. This is Present Perfect tense with 'There'.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There has been' (एकवचन) और 'There have been' (बहुवचन) का उपयोग तब होता है जब कोई बात हाल ही में हुई हो और अभी भी उसका असर हो। यह Present Perfect tense है।
lessons.formula: There has been + Singular Noun | There have been + Plural Noun
lessons.formulaHindi: There has been + एकवचन संज्ञा | There have been + बहुवचन संज्ञा
keyRules: There has been = एकवचन (recent past with present impact)
There have been = बहुवचन (recent past with present impact)
Negative: There hasn't been / There haven't been
Question: Has there been? / Have there been?
Use with: recently, lately, so far, in the last few days

examples.english: There has been a mistake.
examples.hindi: एक गलती हुई है।

examples.english: There have been many changes.
examples.hindi: कई बदलाव हुए हैं।

examples.english: There has been an accident near the school.
examples.hindi: स्कूल के पास एक दुर्घटना हुई है।

examples.english: There have been many complaints lately.
examples.hindi: हाल ही में कई शिकायतें हुई हैं।

examples.english: There has been a power failure today.
examples.hindi: आज बिजली बंद हो गई है।

examples.english: There have been heavy rains this week.
examples.hindi: इस हफ्ते भारी बारिश हुई है।

examples.english: There has been no progress on this project.
examples.hindi: इस project पर कोई progress नहीं हुई है।

examples.english: There have been many improvements in the system.
examples.hindi: सिस्टम में कई सुधार हुए हैं।

examples.english: There has been a delay in delivery.
examples.hindi: डिलीवरी में देरी हुई है।

examples.english: There have been several meetings this month.
examples.hindi: इस महीने कई मीटिंगें हुई हैं।

lessons.title: Negative Forms — There isn't / There aren't / There wasn't / There weren't
lessons.theory: To make a 'There' sentence negative, just add 'not' after the verb. We often use contractions in spoken English.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There' वाले वाक्य को नकारात्मक बनाने के लिए verb के बाद 'not' लगाएं। बोलते समय हम अक्सर contraction (isn't, aren't) का प्रयोग करते हैं।
lessons.formula: There is/are/was/were + not + Noun | Contraction: isn't / aren't / wasn't / weren't / won't be
lessons.formulaHindi: There is/are/was/were + not + संज्ञा | Contraction: isn't / aren't / wasn't / weren't
keyRules: There isn't = there is not (singular present negative)
There aren't = there are not (plural present negative)
There wasn't = there was not (singular past negative)
There weren't = there were not (plural past negative)
There won't be = there will not be (future negative)
There hasn't been / There haven't been (perfect negative)

examples.english: There isn't any milk in the fridge.
examples.hindi: फ्रिज में दूध नहीं है।

examples.english: There aren't any chairs in the room.
examples.hindi: कमरे में कोई कुर्सियाँ नहीं हैं।

examples.english: There wasn't a problem before.
examples.hindi: पहले कोई समस्या नहीं थी।

examples.english: There weren't many people at the meeting.
examples.hindi: मीटिंग में ज्यादा लोग नहीं थे।

examples.english: There won't be any classes tomorrow.
examples.hindi: कल कोई classes नहीं होंगी।

examples.english: There isn't enough time.
examples.hindi: पर्याप्त समय नहीं है।

examples.english: There aren't any good restaurants here.
examples.hindi: यहाँ कोई अच्छे restaurants नहीं हैं।

examples.english: There wasn't any food left.
examples.hindi: कोई खाना बचा नहीं था।

examples.english: There weren't any questions from the students.
examples.hindi: छात्रों से कोई सवाल नहीं थे।

examples.english: There won't be any delay this time.
examples.hindi: इस बार कोई देरी नहीं होगी।

examples.english: There isn't a single copy available.
examples.hindi: एक भी copy उपलब्ध नहीं है।

examples.english: There aren't enough employees in the team.
examples.hindi: टीम में पर्याप्त कर्मचारी नहीं हैं।

commonErrors.explanation: Use 'isn't any' or 'is no' — not both together
Use 'aren't' not 'don't have' with existential there

lessons.title: Questions — Is there? / Are there? / Was there? / Were there? / Will there be?
lessons.theory: To ask questions using 'There', simply invert the subject and verb — put the verb (is/are/was/were/will) before 'there'. This is called subject-verb inversion.
lessons.theoryHindi: 'There' का प्रयोग करके प्रश्न बनाने के लिए, verb को 'there' के पहले रखें। इसे subject-verb inversion कहते हैं।
keyRules: Is there...? = क्या कोई एक चीज़ है?
Are there...? = क्या कई चीज़ें हैं?
Was there...? = क्या एक चीज़ थी?
Were there...? = क्या कई चीज़ें थीं?
Will there be...? = क्या भविष्य में होगा?
Has there been? / Have there been? = Present Perfect questions

examples.english: Is there a pen on the table?
examples.hindi: क्या मेज पर एक कलम है?

examples.english: Are there any seats available?
examples.hindi: क्या कोई सीटें उपलब्ध हैं?

examples.english: Was there a problem in the meeting?
examples.hindi: क्या मीटिंग में कोई समस्या थी?

examples.english: Were there many people at the event?
examples.hindi: क्या event में कई लोग थे?

examples.english: Will there be a test tomorrow?
examples.hindi: क्या कल परीक्षा होगी?

examples.english: Is there any milk in the fridge?
examples.hindi: क्या फ्रिज में दूध है?

examples.english: Are there any good doctors here?
examples.hindi: क्या यहाँ कोई अच्छे डॉक्टर हैं?

examples.english: Was there a train at 7 am?
examples.hindi: क्या सुबह 7 बजे ट्रेन थी?

examples.english: Were there any complaints last month?
examples.hindi: क्या पिछले महीने कोई शिकायतें थीं?

examples.english: Will there be any changes in the plan?
examples.hindi: क्या plan में कोई बदलाव होंगे?

examples.english: Is there a bathroom on this floor?
examples.hindi: क्या इस floor पर bathroom है?

examples.english: Are there enough resources for this project?
examples.hindi: क्या इस project के लिए पर्याप्त resources हैं?

examples.english: Has there been any update from the client?
examples.hindi: क्या client से कोई update आया है?

examples.english: Have there been any problems with the software?
examples.hindi: क्या software में कोई समस्याएँ हुई हैं?

examples.english: Is there anything I can help you with?
examples.hindi: क्या मैं आपकी कुछ मदद कर सकता हूँ?

commonErrors.explanation: Use Is/Are — not Does — with existential there

memoryTricks: Is = एक है | Are = कई हैं | Was = एक था | Were = कई थे | Will be = होगा
Singular → is/was | Plural → are/were | Future → will be (same for both)
Question बनाने के लिए: Verb को पहले रखो — Is there? Are there?
Negative बनाने के लिए: not जोड़ो — isn't, aren't, wasn't, weren't
